disconnect.mcgatekeeper.session_already_: Arr, a plunderin' session fer yer account be already sailin'
disconnect.mcgatekeeper.new_connection: Walk th' plank: new plunderin' connection from yer account
screen.mcgatekeeper.title: McGatekeeper - Key Plunder
screen.mcgatekeeper.warning: Beware: exported chests contain private keys — guard 'em wi' yer life.
screen.mcgatekeeper.status.cleared: All keys sent t' Davy Jones
screen.mcgatekeeper.clear_confirm_body: This sends all saved keys t' Davy Jones. Ye'll need t' re-authorize on each island.
screen.mcgatekeeper.delete_confirm_body: This sinks th' saved key fer %s. Ye won't be able t' board that island 'til th' cap'n allows ye back.
